achievements.title: Welcome to Eggman's Incredible Interstellar Amusement Park!
achievements.description: Complete Tropical Resort Act 1.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Boost!
achievements.description: Finish an Act or Boss with the White Wisp's Boost ability unlocked.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Burst!
achievements.description: Finish an Act or Boss with the Red Wisp's Burst ability unlocked.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Rocket!
achievements.description: Finish an Act or Boss with the Orange Wisp's Rocket ability unlocked.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Drill!
achievements.description: Finish an Act or Boss with the Yellow Wisp's Drill ability unlocked.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Laser!
achievements.description: Finish an Act or Boss with the Cyan Wisp's Laser ability unlocked.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Void!
achievements.description: Finish an Act or Boss with the Violet Wisp's Void ability unlocked.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Always Happy to Help!
achievements.description: Complete every Mission in the game.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Green Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in the Tropical Resort.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Yellow Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in the Sweet Mountain.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: White Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in the Starlight Carnival.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Red Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in Planet Wisp.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Purple Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in the Aquarium Park.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Dark Blue Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in the Asteroid Coaster.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Light Blue Chaos Emerald Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect the Chaos Emerald in Game Land.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: All Chaos Emeralds Acquired!
achievements.description: Collect all of the 7 Chaos Emeralds.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Dedicated Ring Collector
achievements.description: Collect a total of 2500 Rings. (Single session)
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Unparalleled Ring Collector
achievements.description: Collect a total of 5000 Rings. (Single session)
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Hope of the Wisps
achievements.description: Save a total of 250 Wisps. (Single session)
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Savior of the Wisps
achievements.description: Save a total of 500 Wisps. (Single session)
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Even Without Wings, I Can Still Fly!
achievements.description: Reach the Goal of Tropical Resort Act 1 without taking the glider.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Can't Touch This, Egghead!
achievements.description: Clear the running section of Terminal Velocity without taking any damage.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Speak With Your Heart!
achievements.description: Complete the game and watch the credits.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Saving The Mother
achievements.description: Defeat and restore the Nega Mother Wisp.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Can't Relax Just Yet!
achievements.description: Clear both Acts and defeat the Boss of the Tropical Resort with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: I'll Skip On Dessert, Thanks!
achievements.description: Clear both Acts and defeat the Boss of the Sweet Mountain with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: No Time For Sightseeing!
achievements.description: Clear both Acts and defeat the Boss of the Starlight Carnival with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: I've Got No Time To Waste!
achievements.description: Clear both Acts and defeat the Boss of Planet Wisp with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Now's Not The Time For A Swim!
achievements.description: Clear both Acts and defeat the Boss of the Aquarium Park with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: These Rides Are Fast, But I'm Faster!
achievements.description: Clear both Acts and defeat the Boss of the Asteroid Coaster with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Eggman, You're Finished!
achievements.description: Clear Terminal Velocity with an S Rank.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Hope I Didn't Rough Her Up Too Bad...
achievements.description: Defeat and restore the Nega Mother Wisp with an S Rank.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Qualified Orb Collector
achievements.description: Clear all 7 Special Stages with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: No, Seriously, It's My Pleasure
achievements.description: Complete every Mission in the game with an S Rank.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Resort Rummaging
achievements.description: Collect all of the Red Star Rings in the Tropical Resort.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Sweet Scavenging
achievements.description: Collect all of the Red Star Rings in the Sweet Mountain.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Starlight Searching
achievements.description: Collect all of the Red Star Rings in the Starlight Carnival.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Planetary Prowling
achievements.description: Collect all of the Red Star Rings on Planet Wisp.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Aquarium Ascertaining
achievements.description: Collect all of the Red Star Rings in the Aquarium Park.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Coaster Combing
achievements.description: Collect all of the Red Star Rings in the Asteroid Coaster.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: This Park Was A Blast!
achievements.description: Clear every Act, Special Stage, Boss and Mission with S Ranks.
achievements.author: DanB

achievements.title: Certified Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Collect every single Red Star Ring in the game.
achievements.author: DanB
